classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为输出端法兰/端面机械结构图，显示方形安装面、中心圆、4个安装孔及尺寸标注'□80'、'4-M6深(depth)20'、'Φ90'，用于表达安装孔和外形定位尺寸。

Merged separated thread callout, depth word, and depth value into one hole specification.
Corrected OCR misread ∅6 to visible diameter callout Φ90.

terminology_notes: M6 denotes metric threaded hole size.

Corrected OCR '1' to visible dimension label 'I' based on engineering callout context.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized as the diameter symbol.
h7 is treated as an ISO shaft/hole tolerance class as visibly marked.

Horizontal dimension from the left datum line to an internal shoulder feature.

Horizontal dimension on the left shaft indicates the protruding shaft length.
Vertical diameter callout identifies a cylindrical fit diameter with h7 tolerance.

classification.reason: 目标区域是'法兰部位详细尺寸表'，单位为'mm'，按马达种类T1、T2、T3列出A、B、C、D、E、F、I等法兰安装相关尺寸及螺纹深度，如'M3深(depth)6.5'、'M4深(depth)6.5'，属于机械法兰尺寸数据。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
